examples.title: Add a 3x4 Table to a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a 3‑row by 4‑column table and insert it into the structure tree of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged‑content API for accessibility.

examples.title: Add ActualText to Images for PDF Accessibility
examples.description: Shows how to attach an ActualText attribute to image elements in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, providing screen‑reader alternative text for accessibility.

examples.title: Add Caption Note to Figure in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a Figure element in a tagged PDF and attach a Note element as a caption, improving accessibility with alternative text.

examples.title: Add Custom Tag to Paragraph in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a tagged PDF, add a paragraph element, assign a custom tag name, and save the document while handling platform‑specific GDI+ requirements.

examples.title: Add External Link with Title to a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a LinkElement in a tagged PDF, assign a title attribute for accessibility, and link it to an external URL using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Note Element to Paragraph in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a note (footnote/endnote) and attach it as a child of a paragraph in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Page Break Element to Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to insert a page‑break element into the logical structure of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API for improved accessibility.

examples.title: Add Paragraph with ActualText under TOCI in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a TOCI (Table of Contents Item) element in a tagged PDF, add a paragraph beneath it, and set the paragraph's ActualText for improved accessibility.

examples.title: Add Placeholder TextBox Form Field and Tag in PDF
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextBox form field with placeholder text, adds it to the document's form, and tags the field in the PDF structure tree for accessibility.

examples.title: Add Tagged Form Field to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a text box form field, register it in the AcroForm, and associate it with a /Form structure element for accessibility tagging.

examples.title: Apply Custom Row Borders to PDF Table
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF document with a table and set different border styles for rows based on their index, enhancing visual distinction and accessibility.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Tagged PDFs with Auto‑Tagging
examples.description: Demonstrates enabling Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging, converting each PDF in a folder to a tagged PDF (PDF/A‑1B) and saving the results to a separate output directory.

examples.title: Batch PDF/UA Validation with XML Logs and Compliance Dashboard
examples.description: Loads all PDF files from a folder, validates each against the PDF/UA accessibility standard using Aspose.Pdf, saves an XML validation log per file, and prints a console dashboard summarizing compliance percentages.

examples.title: Batch PDF/UA Validation with CSV Summary
examples.description: The example validates all PDF files in a folder against PDF/UA 1.0, writes XML logs for each file, and creates a summary CSV indicating compliance or errors.

examples.title: Batch Tag PDFs and Save with Suffix
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of PDF files, enable Aspose.Pdf auto‑tagging, add missing accessibility tags, set language and title, and save each processed document with a custom suffix.

examples.title: Check PDF/UA Compliance with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, evaluates its PDF/UA accessibility compliance using Aspose.Pdf, and writes the boolean result to the console.

examples.title: Create Internal Page Link in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a Link structure element with a LocalHyperlink that jumps to a specific page in a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Merged Table Header in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a table with a merged header row to a PDF, assign the TH role and set ActualText for each header cell using Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API.

examples.title: Create Tagged Bullet and Numbered Lists in PDF
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, adds a bulleted list and a numbered list using the Aspose.Pdf.Tagged API, sets document language and title, validates PDF/UA compliance, and saves the tagged PDF.

examples.title: Create Tagged PDF with Heading and Language Attribute
examples.description: Shows how to create a new PDF, enable tagged content, set the document language and title, add a level‑1 heading element with its own language attribute, and save the file.

examples.title: Create Tagged PDF Table with Custom Cell Types and Validate PDF/A-1B
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a logical table to a PDF, assign custom data‑type tags to each cell, render a visual table, and run PDF/A‑1B validation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Tagged PDF with Table of Contents
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a tagged PDF, add a logical Table of Contents page and heading entries using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

examples.title: Enable Auto‑Tagging and Convert PDF to PDF/UA
examples.description: Demonstrates how to turn on automatic tagging, convert a PDF to the PDF/UA accessibility standard, set basic document metadata, and save the result as a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read the tagged content of a PDF, traverse its logical structure elements, and serialize the hierarchy to a JSON file for accessibility analysis.

examples.title: Export PDF Structure Tree to XML and Generate Report via XSLT
examples.description: Demonstrates how to export a PDF's tagged structure tree to an XML file using Aspose.Pdf and then transform that XML into an HTML report with XSLT.

examples.title: Export Tagged PDF Structure to JSON
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged logical structure, recursively builds a plain‑object hierarchy and serializes it to a formatted JSON file while preserving the tag hierarchy.

examples.title: Extract Link URLs from PDF and Export to CSV
examples.description: Opens a PDF, iterates through its pages and link annotations, retrieves external URLs via GoToURIAction, and writes the URLs to a CSV file.

examples.title: Extract Notes from Tagged PDF to Text File
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged structure, finds all Note elements, concatenates their actual text, and writes the result to a plain‑text file.

examples.title: Extract Text from Tagged PDF Structure Tree
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its tagged content, recursively walk the logical structure tree, and collect the ActualText of each structure element.

examples.title: Find Images Missing Alternative Text in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and images, and collect the IDs of images that lack alternative text for accessibility compliance.

examples.title: Iterate Tagged PDF Structure Elements and Log Metadata
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its tagged content, walks the logical structure tree recursively, and prints each element's tag name, title, and language.

examples.title: Create Nested Table Inside a Paragraph for Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to build a logical structure with a paragraph that contains an outer table, which in turn hosts a nested table, and validates the tagging hierarchy using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Parse PDF Validation Report and Summarize Error Codes
examples.description: Demonstrates validating a PDF against PDF/A with Aspose.Pdf, generating an XML validation report, and parsing it to produce a summary of error codes and the most common violations.

examples.title: Propagate Language Attribute to All Tagged Elements
examples.description: Shows how to set the document language on the root of a tagged PDF and automatically propagate it to every structure element using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace Note Element in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to locate and remove existing Note elements in a tagged PDF and insert a new note with updated text using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

examples.title: Set Hidden Pronunciation Text Using ActualText on a Span in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a span element to a PDF's tagged structure and supply hidden pronunciation text via the ActualText property for accessibility.

examples.title: Set Document Language in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a language attribute to the PDF's structure tree using Aspose.Pdf's tagged content API.

examples.title: Set Figure Title in Tagged PDF for Accessibility
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a figure element with a concise title and alternative text to a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, enhancing document accessibility.

examples.title: Set Missing Language Attributes in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, sets a default document language, and recursively assigns the language attribute to any structure elements that lack it, ensuring proper accessibility metadata.

examples.title: Set Paragraph Title in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TaggedContent API to create a paragraph element, assign its Title property as a concise summary, and attach it to a tagged PDF document.

examples.title: Set Root Structure Element Title in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to assign a title to the root structure element of a tagged PDF using Aspose.Pdf, and optionally update the document's Info title for full metadata coverage.

examples.title: Set Structure Element Language to French in a Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to locate a ParagraphElement in a PDF's tagged structure tree, change its language attribute to French (fr-FR), and save the updated document.

examples.title: Style Table Cells with Background, Border, and Padding
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF table and applying per‑cell background color, border thickness/color, and padding to improve visual accessibility.

examples.title: Update Paragraph ActualText in Tagged PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, locate a paragraph by its ActualText title within the tagged structure, modify the ActualText for accessibility, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Validate PDF/UA Compliance and Export Structure Report
examples.description: Shows how to check a PDF for PDF/UA compliance with Aspose.Pdf, write an XML validation report, and optionally export the full PDF structure to XML.

examples.title: Add Blank Page to PDF Document
examples.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, insert a new blank page at the end, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Custom XMP Metadata to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a custom XMP metadata block, attaching it to the document, and saving the file while preserving existing metadata.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with Compression
examples.description: Creates sample PDFs, converts each to PDF/A‑1b format with resource optimization for high compression, and prints a summary report.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A-1b with CSV Log
examples.description: Creates sample PDFs, converts each to PDF/A‑1b format, saves conversion logs, and records results in a CSV file.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PDF/A‑1b
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, convert each to PDF/A‑1b compliance with Aspose.Pdf, and write the converted files and logs to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Encrypted PDFs with Owner Password
examples.description: Shows how to open multiple password‑protected PDF files using a shared owner password, remove their encryption, and save unprotected copies.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with a User Password
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf by applying the same user and owner passwords and saving the protected copies to a separate directory.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Reads a JSON configuration file containing multiple PDF encryption jobs, applies user and owner passwords using Aspose.Pdf, and saves the encrypted files while logging success or failure.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with File‑Name Derived Passwords and Secure Log
examples.description: The example encrypts all PDF files in a folder using passwords generated from each file name, saves the encrypted PDFs to an output folder, and records the passwords in a DPAPI‑protected log file.

examples.title: Change PDF User and Owner Passwords with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to open a password‑protected PDF using the owner password, change the user and owner passwords, and save the PDF with the new credentials.

examples.title: Change PDF Version to 1.5 with Incremental Update
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, converts it to PDF version 1.5 while logging conversion issues, and saves it using incremental update mode.

examples.title: Compress PDF Using Default Settings and Compare File Size
examples.description: Loads a PDF, saves it with Aspose.Pdf's default compression, then reports the original and compressed file sizes and the percentage reduction.

examples.title: Compress PDF with High Compression Level
examples.description: Loads a PDF, applies full optimization (high compression) using OptimizationOptions, saves it with PdfSaveOptions, and compares the original and compressed file sizes.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, convert it to PDF/A-1b format while preserving the original structure and embedded fonts, and save the resulting file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Font Embedding
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, converting it to PDF/A‑1b compliance (which embeds any missing fonts), and saving the resulting archival‑ready file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b Compliance
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, converts it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while logging any conversion errors, and saves the compliant document.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/A-1b with Metadata Preservation
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/A‑1b compliance while preserving metadata, and save the resulting file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 with CMYK Color Space
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, convert it to PDF/X‑3 compliance while forcing all colors to CMYK using an ICC profile, and save the resulting file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X-3 Preserving ICC Profiles
examples.description: Shows how to convert a PDF to PDF/X-3 with Aspose.Pdf while retaining existing ICC color profiles and logging conversion messages.

examples.title: Convert PDF to PDF/X‑3 with Color Profiles
examples.description: Demonstrates converting an existing PDF to PDF/X‑3 compliance using Aspose.Pdf while preserving embedded color profiles, then saving the output file.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Version 1.4 from MemoryStream
examples.description: The example loads a PDF file into a MemoryStream, creates an Aspose.Pdf Document from it, converts the document to PDF version 1.4, and saves the result to disk.

examples.title: Create PDF/A‑1b Document with Text Paragraph
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a text paragraph to the first page, converting the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance, and saving the result.

examples.title: Create PDF/X‑3 Document with Multiple Pages
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add three pages with simple text, convert the document to PDF/X‑3 compliance, and save the resulting file.

examples.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF, removing its encryption, and saving an unprotected copy using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Download PDF from URL and Save Locally
examples.description: Demonstrates fetching a PDF via a WebRequest stream, loading it with Aspose.Pdf, and saving it to a local file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES-128 and High-Quality Printing Permission
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑128, set permissions for high‑quality printing, and verify the encryption by decrypting the document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Disable Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with no permissions (including printing), save the encrypted file, and verify that the document is encrypted using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF Allowing Only Form Filling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set permissions so only form filling is allowed, encrypt it using AES‑256, and save the protected file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Form Filling Permission Only
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, allowing only form filling while disabling content extraction and other actions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password Only
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by setting only an owner password, granting full access to the owner while restricting all user permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with 128‑bit RC4 and Verify Size Increase
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using 128‑bit RC4 with Aspose.Pdf, then compares the original and encrypted file sizes to confirm the encrypted file is slightly larger.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 and Disable Copying
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using the RC4 128‑bit algorithm, revoke all copy permissions, and programmatically verify the security settings by opening and decrypting the document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF from Stream and Write to Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from an input stream, applying AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, and saving the secured PDF to an output stream.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password Only (Restrict Editing and Copying)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply user‑only password protection with AES‑256 encryption, and set permissions to allow printing while disabling editing and copying.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Form‑Fill Only Permission
examples.description: The example loads an existing PDF, applies password protection with a user and owner password, restricts permissions to only allow form filling, and saves the encrypted document using AES‑256 encryption.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Passwords and Restrict Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, applying user and owner passwords, setting permissions to allow only content extraction (disabling printing), and saving the encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Pages to Separate Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to split a PDF into individual page PDFs by loading the source document, extracting each page, and saving it as a separate file.

examples.title: Incremental PDF Update with Page Append
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an existing PDF with a read/write stream, adding a blank page, optionally appending pages from another PDF, and saving the document incrementally to preserve the original content.

examples.title: Insert PDF Page into Another PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf, extract a page from the source PDF, and insert it into a specific position of the target PDF using the Pages.Insert method.

examples.title: Load PDF from Byte Array and Update Title Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, loading it from a byte array, changing its title metadata, and saving the result.

examples.title: Open Password-Protected PDF Without Providing a Password
examples.description: Shows how to attempt opening an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf and catch the InvalidPasswordException when no password is supplied.

examples.title: Open PDF from FileStream and Save with Default Settings
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF document using a FileStream and then save it to another file using Aspose.Pdf with default options.

examples.title: Open PDF and Get Page Count
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF file from disk using Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of pages in the document.

examples.title: Remove Third Page from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, delete the third page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, rotates each page by 180 degrees, and saves the rotated version to a new file.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Page from Byte Array
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, rotates the third page by 180 degrees, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Second Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, rotate the second page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Save PDF to MemoryStream and Write to File
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, saving it into a MemoryStream, and then writing the stream contents to a new file on disk.

examples.title: Save PDF to XPS without Embedding Fonts
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and save it as XPS while disabling TrueType font embedding using XpsSaveOptions.

examples.title: Set PDF Document Title and Verify It
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set its document title metadata, save the file, and then reopen it to confirm the title was persisted.

examples.title: Set PDF Metadata (Author, Title, Subject)
examples.description: The example opens an existing PDF, sets its document information fields (Author, Title, Subject) using Aspose.Pdf, saves the file, and then reopens it to verify the metadata.

examples.title: Split PDF into Two Parts at Page Ten
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract pages 1‑10 and the remaining pages into separate documents, and save each part as a new PDF file.

examples.title: Split PDF into Sections Using Page Ranges
examples.description: Shows how to read a configuration file with named page ranges and split a source PDF into separate PDF files for each section using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single-Page Files
examples.description: Shows how to split a multi‑page PDF into separate one‑page PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's Document class and the Pages.Add method.

examples.title: Split PDF into Single‑Page Files and Store in Separate Folders
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a large PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract each page into its own PDF document, and save each page into a dedicated folder.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF using a FileInfo object, modify its Author metadata, and save the changes back to the original file.

examples.title: Update PDF Author Metadata
examples.description: Loads a PDF file, replaces its Author metadata with the current user name, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Compare A Large Batch Of Pdfs Using Parallel Processing Limiting Concurrency To Avoid Excessive Memory Consumption
Compare Encrypted PDFs Side‑by‑Side
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open two password‑protected PDF files and perform a side‑by‑side visual comparison using Aspose.Pdf, saving the result as a new PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDF Documents Page by Page and Generate Diff PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files page by page using Aspose.Pdf's default ComparisonOptions and save the resulting differences as a diff PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDFs and Detect Font Differences
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to compare two PDF documents, count font‑related diff operations, and optionally generate a visual diff report.

examples.title: Compare Two PDFs and Write Diff PDF to HTTP Response Stream
examples.description: Creates two sample PDFs, compares them, and writes the difference PDF directly to an output stream (e.g., an HTTP response).

examples.title: Compare PDFs with Different Page Sizes
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF pages using Aspose.Pdf, automatically resizing pages when their dimensions differ and generating a PDF highlighting the differences.

examples.title: Compare Two PDFs and Generate a Difference Report
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's comparison API to perform a flat text comparison between two PDF files and produce a PDF that highlights the differences.

examples.title: Compare PDFs and Generate Side‑by‑Side Difference PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents using Aspose.Pdf's comparison API, retrieve text differences, and create a side‑by‑side PDF that visualizes those differences.

examples.title: Compare PDFs While Ignoring Signature Fields
examples.description: Shows how to compare two signed PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf and treat digital signature fields as unchanged by excluding their rectangles from the visual diff.

examples.title: Compare PDFs Ignoring Compression Differences
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs that have the same content but different compression settings, ensuring compression does not affect the textual diff results.

examples.title: Compare PDFs Including Form Field Values
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf while enabling the IncludeFormFields option so that form field values are part of the diff, and saves a visual comparison PDF.

examples.title: Compare PDFs from Memory Streams and Output Diff to Memory Stream
examples.description: Creates two sample PDFs, loads them from memory streams, compares them graphically, and writes the diff PDF to another memory stream without using temporary files.

examples.title: Compare Selected Page Range of Two PDFs
examples.description: Loads two PDF files, sets the start and end pages (using reflection if the properties are unavailable), and compares only that page range, reporting the number of differences per page.

examples.title: Compare Specific PDF Pages Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare selected pages of two PDFs by passing an array of page numbers, collect text differences, and generate a side‑by‑side visual comparison PDF.

examples.title: Compare Unicode Text in PDFs with Different Encodings
examples.description: Shows how to load two PDF files with different language encodings and use Aspose.Pdf's comparison API to detect Unicode text differences.

examples.title: Exclude Annotations from PDF Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to exclude annotation areas from side‑by‑side PDF comparison by adding their bounding rectangles to the ExcludeAreas collections.

examples.title: Exclude Areas from PDF Side‑by‑Side Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to define rectangular regions to exclude from each PDF and run a side‑by‑side comparison using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Exclude Footer Areas in PDF Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to define rectangular footer regions and set them in SideBySideComparisonOptions to exclude those areas when comparing two PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate Diff PDF by Comparing Two PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer and create a highlighted diff PDF saved to a specified folder.

examples.title: Generate Diff PDF with Highlighted Text Changes and Verify Default Highlight Color
examples.description: This example compares two PDF documents, creates a diff PDF that highlights text differences, and checks that the highlight annotation uses the default red color.

examples.title: Generate JSON Diff Report for PDF Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf and generate a JSON report of the differences using DiffOperation objects.

examples.title: Generate PDF Comparison Images and Zip Them
examples.description: Shows how to compare two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf, create visual diff images for each page, and package the images into a ZIP archive for easy distribution.

examples.title: Generate Image Differences Between Two PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare the first pages of two PDF files with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer, obtain an ImagesDifference object, and save the source, difference, and destination images.

examples.title: Generate Visual Diff PDF Using GraphicalPdfComparer
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents and create a visual diff PDF with Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

examples.title: Multi‑Threaded PDF Comparison with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare multiple pairs of PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf's side‑by‑side comparison API and Task Parallel Library, while handling errors and disposing resources properly.

examples.title: PDF Comparison Audit Log
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDF documents with Aspose.Pdf, capture each page's diff operations, and write the operation type and page number to a text file for audit purposes.

examples.title: Preserve PDF Metadata After Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs side‑by‑side using Aspose.Pdf and then copy all standard and custom metadata from the source document to the generated diff PDF.

examples.title: Replace Changed Text in PDF Using DiffOperation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compare two PDFs page‑by‑page, extract the original text from differences, and replace the modified page content with the original text.

examples.title: Set Custom Tolerance for PDF Image Comparison
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure a custom similarity tolerance when comparing PDFs that contain scanned images using Aspose.Pdf's GraphicalPdfComparer.

examples.title: Add External File Attachment and Convert to PDF/A‑3b
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed an external text file into a PDF, optionally add a visible file‑attachment annotation, and then convert the document to PDF/A‑3b compliance using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Logo to PDF and Convert to PPTX
examples.description: Shows how to stamp a company logo onto each page of a PDF using ImageStamp and then save the modified document directly as a PPTX file with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add XML Attachment to PDF/A-1b Document
examples.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to PDF/A‑1b and attaching an external XML file as a file attachment annotation.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to JPEG Images with Custom Naming
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert each page of multiple PDF files in a folder to JPEG images using Aspose.Pdf, applying a custom file‑naming pattern for the output files.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to Multi‑Page TIFF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to loop through a list of PDF files and convert each one into a multi‑page TIFF archive using Aspose.Pdf with default (no) compression.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PNG Preserving Folder Structure
examples.description: Demonstrates how to recursively locate PDF files, convert each page to a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf, and save the images while preserving the original directory hierarchy.

examples.title: Batch Convert PDFs to PPTX with SlidesAsImages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to convert multiple PDF files to PPTX format in a batch, using the SlidesAsImages option to rasterize each slide as an image.

examples.title: Convert EPUB to PDF with Custom Page Size
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an EPUB file using EpubLoadOptions with a custom page size and saving it as a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert LaTeX to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a .tex file using TeXLoadOptions and convert it to a PDF while keeping equations as vector graphics.

examples.title: Convert Markdown to PDF with Code Block Preservation
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a Markdown file using MdLoadOptions and converting it to a PDF document while preserving code blocks, then saving the result.

examples.title: Convert OFD to PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading an OFD document using OfdLoadOptions and saving it as a PDF with default settings using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PCL to PDF with HP‑GL/2 Support
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PCL file (including HP‑GL/2 vectors) using Aspose.Pdf and saving it directly as a PDF document.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page Region to PNG
examples.description: Shows how to define a rectangular region on a PDF page, set the CropBox to that region, and render the cropped area as a PNG image using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Convert PDF Page to JPEG Image
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, select a specific page, and save it as a JPEG image using Aspose.Pdf's JpegDevice with the default DPI.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to GIF Images
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and use GifDevice to render each page as a separate GIF file using default parameters.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to Separate HTML Files

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences and Save as XML
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with PdfContentEditor, obtain its viewer preference flags, and serialize the value to a simple XML configuration file.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Viewer Preferences with PdfContentEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF using PdfContentEditor, obtain the viewer preference flags, and print each enabled flag to the console.

examples.title: Retrieve Viewer Preferences After Incremental PDF Edits
examples.description: The example loads a PDF with PdfContentEditor, changes viewer preferences (hide menu bar and set page mode), reads the current viewer preference value after each change, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Stamp Image on PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to a PDF page and rotate it 90 degrees clockwise using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Rotate Text Annotation by 90 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to create a text stamp as an annotation, rotate it 90 degrees, and add it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Select Express Shipping Method Radio Button in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to programmatically select the "Express" option of a radio button field in a PDF's AcroForm and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set Annotation Opacity Using PdfAnnotationEditor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use the PdfAnnotationEditor facade to iterate through all annotations in a PDF and set their opacity to 0.5, making them partially transparent.

examples.title: Set Checkbox Field in PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to programmatically check a checkbox field in a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set Hide Menubar Viewer Preference in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read the current viewer preferences of a PDF, enable the HideMenubar flag while preserving other settings, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set PDF Permissions to Allow Copying but Restrict Form Editing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to modify PDF security privileges, enabling text copying while disabling form field filling and annotation changes.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Full‑Screen Mode
examples.description: Demonstrates how to enable the full‑screen viewer preference for a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Hide Navigation Panels
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to set the PageMode viewer preference to UseNone, which hides all navigation panels when the PDF is opened.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Show Outlines
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure the PDF viewer preference so that the document outline (bookmarks) panel is displayed by default using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single Page Layout with 100% Zoom
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a PDF's viewer preference to single‑page layout and set the default zoom to 100 % using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preference to Single‑Page Layout
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades PdfContentEditor to change a PDF's viewer preference to single‑page layout and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Viewer Preferences and Default Zoom
examples.description: Shows how to configure a PDF to open with the thumbnails pane visible, fit the window to the page, and set the default zoom to fit width using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Red Border Color for Redaction Annotation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a redaction annotation to a PDF page and set its border color to bright red using Aspose.Pdf's Facade API.

examples.title: Silently Print PDF to Network Printer
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfViewer and dispatch it to a network printer silently, without displaying the print dialog.

examples.title: Split Edited PDF into Single-Page Files with Annotations
examples.description: Shows how to split a PDF that contains annotations into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.SplitToPages.

examples.title: Toggle Full‑Screen Viewer Preference in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to enable or disable the Full‑Screen viewer preference of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Underline Specific Phrase on PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate a given phrase on the fourth page of a PDF and add an underline annotation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Update PDF Creator Metadata Using XMP
examples.description: Shows how to read existing XMP metadata from a PDF, change the dc:creator field, and save the updated metadata to a new PDF file.

examples.title: Validate PDF Integrity After Adding Margins
examples.description: The example computes SHA‑256 hashes of a PDF before and after applying uniform margins using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, then compares the hashes to verify file integrity.

examples.title: Verify PDF Attachment After Save
examples.description: Shows how to add a document attachment to a PDF with PdfContentEditor, save the file, and confirm the attachment exists using PdfExtractor in a unit test.

examples.title: Verify Text Annotation Position in PDF
examples.description: Creates a PDF, adds a TextAnnotation with a specific rectangle, saves and reloads the document, then asserts that the annotation's coordinates match the expected values.

examples.title: Asynchronous PDF Text and Image Extraction
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all text and images from a PDF file asynchronously using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, keeping the UI responsive with async/await.

examples.title: Batch Extract Text from PDFs to Files
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over a folder of PDF documents, extract their text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and save each output as a .txt file with the same base name.

examples.title: Batch Text Extraction from PDFs with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and extract their text into separate .txt files.

examples.title: Batch OCR Text Extraction from PDFs using Aspose.Pdf AI
examples.description: Demonstrates processing multiple PDF files, extracting their text with Aspose.Pdf AI OCR copilot, and saving the results as text files.

examples.title: Cancel PDF Text Extraction with CancellationToken
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use a CancellationToken to abort Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor text extraction when a user requests termination, checking the token after each page.

examples.title: Check if PDF Contains Text via MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text into a MemoryStream and determine whether a PDF file contains any textual content.

examples.title: Check PDF for Both Text and Images
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to verify that a PDF contains at least one piece of text and at least one image.

examples.title: Configurable PDF Text, Image, and Attachment Extraction
examples.description: Demonstrates reading a JSON configuration to toggle extraction of text, images, and attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade.

examples.title: Create PDF Summary with First Three Pages Text
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from the first three pages of a PDF and generate a new summary PDF containing that extracted text.

examples.title: Detect Text‑Only PDF by Checking for Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to bind a PDF, extract any images into memory, and decide if the document is text‑only based on whether any images are found.

examples.title: Error Handling for Corrupted PDF Binding
examples.description: Demonstrates how to safely bind a PDF using PdfExtractor and catch specific exceptions when the file is corrupted or has an invalid format.

examples.title: Export PDF Images to JPEG with Quality 85
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF and save them as JPEG files with a quality setting of 85 using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfConverter.

examples.title: Extract All Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract every image from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade by setting the page range to all pages and saving each image as PNG.

examples.title: Extract Images from Pages Containing a Keyword
examples.description: Shows how to scan each PDF page for a specific keyword using TextAbsorber and then extract only the images from pages that contain that keyword.

examples.title: Create PDF Portfolio from Extracted Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using the PdfExtractor facade and assemble them into a new PDF where each image occupies its own page.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create a Sprite Sheet
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF into memory streams and merge them horizontally into a single PNG sprite sheet using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Thumbnails
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and generate PNG thumbnails with a maximum size of 200 pixels while preserving aspect ratio.

examples.title: Extract Images Defined in Resources from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to extract all images that are defined in the PDF resources by setting ExtractImageMode to DefinedInResources.

examples.title: Extract Images from First PDF Page to Byte Arrays
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and store them directly in memory as byte arrays for further processing.

examples.title: Extract Images from Encrypted PDF with Password
examples.description: Shows how to provide a user password for an encrypted PDF and extract all embedded images using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Images from Specific PDF Pages as PNG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract images from pages 5‑10 of a PDF and save each image as a PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Output as Base64 JSON
examples.description: The example uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull each image from a PDF, converts it to PNG, encodes it in Base64, gathers basic metadata, and writes a JSON array of the images.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save to ZIP
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF and bundle them into a ZIP archive.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF with GUID Filenames
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and save each image as a PNG with a unique GUID‑based filename to avoid naming collisions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to Temporary Folder
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF using the default extraction mode and save them as PNG files in a temporary directory.

examples.title: Extract Images from a Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a single page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Google Cloud Storage
examples.description: Creates a sample PDF, extracts all images using Aspose.Pdf, and shows where to upload each image to a Google Cloud Storage bucket with public read access.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create Markdown Gallery
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull all images from a PDF, save them to a folder, and generate a markdown file that displays the images as a gallery.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Perform OCR with OpenAI Copilot
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them as PNG files, and then uses Aspose.Pdf.AI OpenAI OCR copilot to recognize hidden text in the images.

examples.title: Extract Images in Original Format with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF while preserving their original format by setting ExtractImageMode to DefinedInResources.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Create CSV Manifest
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts each image on every page using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor, saves the images as PNG files, and generates a CSV manifest with file name, page number, width, and height.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate CSV Report
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, saves each image as a PNG file, and creates a CSV file that lists the image filenames, page numbers, and displayed dimensions.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Generate HTML Gallery
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them to a folder, and then creates a simple HTML page that displays the extracted images as a gallery.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull each image from a PDF and then upload the resulting PNG streams to an Amazon S3 bucket with the AWS SDK.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Prepare for Word Embedding
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF with an image, extract the images using Aspose.Pdf, and prepare them for insertion into a Word document.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as BMP
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save them as BMP files, preserving the original resolution and color depth.

examples.title: Extract Images and Generate PDF/A‑2b Document with XObjects
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from an existing PDF using PdfExtractor, embed each image as an XObject on separate pages, and convert the resulting document to PDF/A‑2b compliance.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Store as SQLite BLOBs
examples.description: Creates a sample PDF with an image, extracts all images using PdfExtractor, and saves each image as a BLOB in a SQLite database.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save them directly to a UNC network share path.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF to UNC Network Share
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and saving them as PNG files to a network‑mapped UNC directory.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Upload to Amazon S3 with Server‑Side Encryption
examples.description: Creates a sample PDF containing images, extracts those images using Aspose.Pdf, and uploads each image to an Amazon S3 bucket via a PUT request with server‑side encryption enabled.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Using PdfExtractor with Automatic Disposal
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor within a using block to ensure proper disposal of resources.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF After Adding Watermark
examples.description: The example adds a PNG watermark to every page of a PDF using PdfFileMend, then extracts all images from the watermarked document and saves them as PNG files.

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Organize by File Extension
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract embedded files from a PDF and save them into subfolders based on their original extensions.

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Compute SHA-256 Hashes
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all embedded attachments from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, save them to disk, and verify their integrity by calculating SHA‑256 hashes.

examples.title: Extract PDF Attachments and Save with Timestamped Names
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract embedded attachments from a PDF, prepend a timestamp to each file name, and save the files to a specified directory.

examples.title: Extract Embedded Attachments from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all embedded file attachments from a PDF and save each to a specified output directory.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Compress to ZIP
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving them as PNG files, and compressing each PNG into a lossless ZIP archive.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Upload to Azure Blob Storage
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor and upload each image as a PNG to an Azure Blob container.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images to Base64 JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF, convert each image stream to a Base64 string, and serialize the collection into JSON for transmission.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images to HTML with Base64
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to pull images from a PDF, convert them to Base64 strings, and embed them in an HTML report via data URIs.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Verify File Signatures
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saves them to disk, and then checks each file's magic number to ensure the image is not corrupted.

examples.title: Extract PDF Images and Build Video Slideshow
examples.description: Shows how to extract all images from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and then create a video slideshow from the saved JPEGs with FFmpeg.

examples.title: Extract PDF Pages as TIFF Images
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and save each page as a high‑resolution TIFF file for lossless archival storage using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF Stream over Network
examples.description: Demonstrates receiving a PDF over a TCP socket and extracting its text and images using Aspose.Pdf without creating intermediate files.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and AES‑Encrypt to File
examples.description: Shows how to extract text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and then encrypt the extracted text with AES before saving it to a file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in Azure Table
examples.description: Creates a sample PDF, extracts its text using Aspose.Pdf, and sends the text as an entity to an Azure Table via a REST call.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text In-Memory Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF from a MemoryStream and extract its text into another MemoryStream using the Aspose.Pdf PdfExtractor facade.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text Page-by-Page with Console Progress
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from each page of a PDF and report progress to the console.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Store in PostgreSQL
examples.description: Creates a sample PDF, extracts its text using Aspose.Pdf, and inserts the extracted text into a PostgreSQL table via ODBC.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Save as UTF-8 File
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract text from a PDF with UTF‑8 encoding and write the result to a text file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Split by Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF, retrieve it via a MemoryStream, and split the result into individual pages using the form‑feed delimiter.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text and Compress to GZip
examples.description: Shows how to extract all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and write it directly into a GZip compressed file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to MemoryStream for Further Processing
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, saving it into a MemoryStream, and preparing the stream for use by another component.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to StringBuilder
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all text from a PDF file and store it in a StringBuilder for further manipulation or saving.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text to StringWriter
examples.description: Shows how to extract all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and write it into a TextWriter such as StringWriter for logging or further processing.

examples.title: Extract PDF Text with Console Progress Bar
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor while showing a simple console progress bar that reflects the processing percentage.

examples.title: Extract Text and Images from PDF using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to create a PdfExtractor, bind a PDF file, extract both text and images, and save the results to separate files.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, loading it into a byte array, and extracting its text with PdfExtractor without writing the extracted text to disk.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Byte Array
examples.description: Shows how to accept a PDF as a byte array, use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to extract its text, and return the extracted content as JSON.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Using Aspose.PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates a command‑line utility that binds a PDF file, extracts its text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and writes the Unicode text to standard output.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF to UTF-8 Text File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to read a PDF, extract its text with UTF-8 encoding, and save it to a .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF with Retry on I/O Errors
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting all text from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor and implementing a retry loop that attempts the extraction up to three times when an IOException occurs.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor facade to bind a PDF file, extract its textual content, and write the result to the console.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDFs Using Aspose PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to read PDF files from a mounted volume, extract their text with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor, and write the output to .txt files.

examples.title: Extract Text from Password-Protected PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to provide the owner password to a protected PDF and extract its text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF While Ignoring Images
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract only text from a PDF by not invoking any image extraction methods.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF Using PdfExtractor
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a sample PDF, simulating a queue message, and extracting its text content using Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF and Verify via Temporary File
examples.description: Demonstrates extracting text from a PDF using PdfExtractor, saving the text to a temporary file, reading it back, and confirming the extracted content matches the original.

examples.title: Generate Contact Sheet PDF with Image Thumbnails
examples.description: The example extracts all images from a source PDF using PdfExtractor and creates a new PDF that arranges those images as thumbnails in a grid, producing a contact sheet.

examples.title: List Names of Embedded PDF Attachments
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to bind a PDF, extract its attachments, and retrieve the attachment file names without saving them.

examples.title: Parallel Extraction of Images from Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract images from several PDF files concurrently using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor together with Task.WhenAll for improved throughput.

examples.title: PDF Diagnostic Tool: Count Pages, Images, and Attachments
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to obtain the total page count, extract and count images, and enumerate attachments in a PDF document.

examples.title: Unit Test for Extracting Text with PdfExtractor
examples.description: Shows how to create a PDF containing known text and write an NUnit test that uses Aspose.Pdf.PdfExtractor to extract and verify the text.

examples.title: Verify ImageExtractionMode Influences Extracted Image Count
examples.description: Creates a PDF with used and unused images, then uses PdfExtractor with different ImageExtractionMode settings to assert the correct number of images are extracted.

examples.title: Asynchronously Fill PDF Form from CSV Data
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read CSV data asynchronously, populate an Aspose.Pdf form using the Form facade, and save the filled PDF with non‑blocking I/O.

examples.title: AutoFiller PDF Merge with Retry on Transient I/O Errors
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import a DataTable, and save the merged document while implementing a retry mechanism for transient file‑access exceptions.

examples.title: Batch Fill PDF Template with Multiple DataTables
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to fill a PDF form repeatedly for each DataTable in a list, producing separate filled PDF files.

examples.title: Bind PDF Form to AutoFiller and List Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF form to an Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller instance and enumerate the form fields using the Form facade.

examples.title: Convert Filled PDF to Byte Array Using PdfViewer
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a filled PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfViewer and returning its content as a byte array without writing the file to disk.

examples.title: Convert PDF to Excel Using Temporary Folder and Disk Buffer
examples.description: Demonstrates converting a large PDF to an Excel file while using a dedicated temporary folder and disk buffering to manage intermediate files and prevent memory or disk‑space issues.

examples.title: Create DataTable from XLSX for PDF Form Filling
examples.description: Reads the first worksheet of an XLSX file, uses the first row as column headers to build a DataTable, and demonstrates passing the table to Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller for PDF form population.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Shows how to protect an existing filled PDF by applying user and owner passwords, setting privileges, and saving the encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Export XLSX Worksheet to DataTable, Filter Rows, and Import into PDF Table
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a DataTable (simulating an exported Excel worksheet), filtering its rows, and importing the subset into a PDF table.

examples.title: Fill PDF AcroForm from CSV Data
examples.description: Shows how to read a CSV file, map its columns to PDF AcroForm field names, fill the fields using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form, and save the resulting PDF.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller with DataColumnCollection
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with form fields, adding matching columns to a DataTable, and filling the form using AutoFiller.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Fields from CSV Using a JSON Mapping
examples.description: Shows how to read a CSV (Excel export), load a JSON column‑to‑PDF‑field mapping, and use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form to fill and save a PDF for each data row.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from DataTable with Row Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates iterating over a DataTable, filling a PDF form template using Aspose.Pdf, saving each row as a single‑page PDF, logging the processed rows and page numbers, and merging the generated pages into a final document.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from Memory Stream using AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a memory stream, filling its form fields with data via AutoFiller, and saving the result without creating intermediate files.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form with DataTable and Exception Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf's AutoFiller to bind a PDF template, import data from a DataTable, save the filled document, and handle missing file or PDF errors.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form with Timeout Cancellation
examples.description: Demonstrates how to fill a PDF form field using Aspose.Pdf and abort the operation if it exceeds a specified timeout by employing a CancellationToken with asynchronous saving.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from Uploaded Excel using AutoFiller
examples.description: Demonstrates an ASP.NET Core controller that receives an XLSX file, creates a sample PDF template, fills it using Aspose.Pdf.AutoFiller, and returns the filled PDF.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form from Multiple CSV Worksheets
examples.description: The example reads each CSV file in a folder as a separate worksheet, loads the data into a DataTable, and uses Aspose.Pdf.Facades.AutoFiller to populate a PDF form template, producing one filled PDF per worksheet.

examples.title: Fill PDF Form Using AutoFiller and Dispose Resources
examples.description: Creates a PDF with a form field, fills it using AutoFiller, saves the result, and disposes the AutoFiller to release unmanaged resources.

examples.title: Generate PDF Page Summary Report with DataTable Row IDs
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts the first cell of the first table on each page as an identifier, optionally matches it against a DataTable, and writes a text report mapping page numbers to row identifiers.

examples.title: Generate Separate PDF Page per DataTable Row and Verify
examples.description: Creates a template PDF, fills it with data from a DataTable using AutoFiller to produce one PDF per row, then checks that each generated PDF contains exactly one page.

examples.title: Generate PDFs with Custom File Names from DataTable
examples.description: Creates a template PDF, fills a form field from a DataTable, and saves each document using a custom file name derived from a column value.

examples.title: Import DataTable into AutoFiller to Fill PDF Form
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF with a form field, populating a DataTable, and using AutoFiller to merge the data into the PDF.

examples.title: Import DataTable into PDF Form with Column Settings
examples.description: Demonstrates setting DataColumn properties such as ReadOnly and Unique before importing the DataTable into a PDF form using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Merge Multiple Filled PDFs into a Single Document
examples.description: Creates a template PDF with a form field, fills it with data from separate DataTables to generate individual PDFs, and merges them into one consolidated PDF.

examples.title: Populate PDF Form Fields with Formatted Numeric Values
examples.description: Creates a PDF with a text field, formats numeric values in a DataTable, and fills the field using AutoFiller.

examples.title: Rename DataTable Columns to Match PDF Form Fields
examples.description: Demonstrates how to rename DataTable columns to match PDF form field names before using AutoFiller to fill the PDF.

examples.title: Save Filled PDF While Preserving Original Layout
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF, optionally fill its form fields, and save the document using the Form facade so that the original layout remains unchanged.

examples.title: Split Filled PDF into Single‑Page PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to split a filled PDF into separate one‑page PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileEditor.
