examples.title: Update PDF User and Owner Passwords from CSV
examples.description: Shows how to read a CSV file containing PDF paths and passwords, then use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to change both user and owner passwords and save the updated PDFs.

examples.title: Bulk Update PDF User Passwords
examples.description: Iterates through a folder of PDF files and re‑encrypts each document with a standardized user password using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Verify Decryption Fails with Incorrect Owner Password
examples.description: Creates a PDF, encrypts it, then attempts to decrypt with an incorrect owner password and confirms the operation fails.

examples.title: Add Multiple Digital Signatures to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to apply two digital signatures on different pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, including certificate setup, optional appearance, and visible signature rectangles.

examples.title: Add Signature Field and Sign PDF on a Specific Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature form field to a chosen page of a PDF using FormEditor, then apply a PKCS#7 digital signature with PdfFileSignature.

examples.title: Add Visible Image Signature to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to apply a visible image signature to a PDF file using the Aspose.Pdf Facade API in a console application.

examples.title: Create Custom PDF Signature Appearance Without Default Caption
examples.description: Demonstrates signing a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while hiding the default "Digitally signed by" label by configuring PKCS1 signature properties and a custom appearance.

examples.title: Digitally Sign First Page of a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, configure a certificate, and add a visible digital signature to page one using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Details from Signed PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a digital signature from a PDF, extract the associated X509 certificate, and display its issuer and expiration date using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Extract and Log Certificate Serial Number from PDF Signatures
examples.description: Demonstrates how to open a signed PDF, enumerate its signatures, extract the associated X509 certificate, and log the certificate's serial number for audit purposes.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Image to PNG
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, extract the image of a signature field (e.g., 'WitnessSignature') using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature, and save it as a PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Signature Images and Generate HTML Report
examples.description: The example loads a signed PDF, extracts each signature's visual image, converts it to a Base64 data URL, and embeds the images into an HTML file for visual inspection.

examples.title: Extract Signing Certificate from PDF Signature
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, locate a specific signature field, extract its X.509 certificate, and save it as a .cer file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Generate PDF Signature Verification Report
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract signature details from a PDF, verify each signature, and create a summary report as a new PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: List PDF Signature Reason and Location
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade, retrieve all signature names, and output each signature's reason and location for auditing.

examples.title: List Signature Names in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and retrieve all non‑empty signature names present in the document.

examples.title: Remove All Signatures from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSignature to strip every digital signature from a PDF and save a clean copy.

examples.title: Remove All Signatures from PDFs Recursively
examples.description: Demonstrates how to traverse a directory tree, load each PDF with Aspose.Pdf.Facades, remove all embedded signatures, and save an unsigned copy.

examples.title: Remove Existing Signatures and Re‑sign PDF with New Certificate
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove all existing signatures from a PDF and apply a new digital signature using a different certificate with Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Remove PDF Signature with Missing Signature Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates checking for a specific signature in a PDF and removing it using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, while gracefully handling the case when the signature does not exist.

examples.title: Remove Signature from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete an existing digital signature named 'ApprovalSignature' from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade and save the updated document.

examples.title: Digitally Sign PDF with French Caption Using SignatureCustomAppearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply a digital PKCS#7 signature to a PDF and set the signature caption language to French via the SignatureCustomAppearance locale settings.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Semi-Transparent Background Appearance
examples.description: Shows how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and set a custom signature appearance with a semi‑transparent background color for improved readability.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Visible Signature on Last Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using a certificate and add a visible signature image positioned at the bottom‑right corner of the last page.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Custom Appearance (Foreground Image & Background Color)
examples.description: Demonstrates how to configure a PDF signature's custom appearance by setting a background color and drawing a foreground image, then applying a PKCS7 digital signature.

examples.title: Sign PDF with PFX Certificate using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF file using a password‑protected PFX certificate with Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade, including a visible signature appearance.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Reason and Location using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF document with a custom reason and location using Aspose.Pdf's Facade API.

examples.title: Sign PDF with Retry on File Lock
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades with a retry mechanism when the source file is locked by another process.

examples.title: Suppress Reason and Location in PDF Digital Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to digitally sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while clearing the Reason, Location, and ContactInfo fields by assigning empty strings before signing.

examples.title: Verify Manager Signature in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document and verifying the cryptographic integrity of a specific signature field using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Verify Multiple PDF Signatures Using PdfFileSignature
examples.description: The example loads a signed PDF, retrieves all signature names, and verifies each signature using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

examples.title: Verify PDF Without Signatures Returns False
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade to check that a PDF with no digital signatures returns false when calling VerifySigned.

examples.title: Verify PDF Signature by Name
examples.description: Demonstrates how to check whether a PDF contains a digital signature with a specific name (e.g., 'ContractSigner') and determine its validity using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileSignature facade.

examples.title: Verify PDF Signatures and Export Results to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to verify each digital signature in a PDF and write a structured JSON report containing the signature names and validation status.

examples.title: Add Background Watermark to Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a background text watermark using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and apply it to pages 2‑5 of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Barcode Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Creates a sample PDF, generates a barcode from the document's unique identifier, and stamps the barcode onto the PDF.

examples.title: Add Creation Date Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read a PDF's creation date (or use the current date) and add it as a text stamp in the top‑left corner of every page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Dynamic Text Stamp to PDF Using Aspose.Pdf Facade
examples.description: Shows how to create a text stamp that includes the current date and author via string interpolation, bind it to a PDF with PdfFileStamp, and save the stamped document.

examples.title: Add Footer Date Stamp to Last PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert a footer containing the current date (MM-dd-yyyy) on the last page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Add Footer Stamp 10 Points Above Bottom Edge
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp to add a footer stamp to each page of a PDF and position it exactly 10 points above the page bottom via the bottom margin parameter.

examples.title: Add Footer with Automatic Page Count to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a gray footer and dynamic page numbering (Page # of {page_count}) to each page of a PDF.

examples.title: Add Header Barcode Image to Each PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to generate a barcode‑like image for each page and add it as a header stamp to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Header Stamp to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF document's pages and add a centered header stamp containing a company name to each page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Lower-Roman Page Numbers to Odd Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to stamp lower‑case Roman numerals as page numbers on only the odd‑numbered pages of a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

examples.title: Add Multi‑Line Colored Header Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a multi‑line header stamp with different font colors using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and place it at the top of each PDF page.

examples.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Watermark to PDF
examples.description: Creates a sample PDF and adds a multi‑line text watermark to each page using FormattedText and Stamp.

examples.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Watermark with Varying Font Sizes
examples.description: Shows how to apply a multi‑line text watermark to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, with each line rendered in a different font size to create visual hierarchy.

examples.title: Add Multi‑Line Text Watermark to PDF from Memory Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, loading it from a memory stream, and adding a multi‑line text watermark with custom font size and color.

examples.title: Add Page Number Stamp with Leading Zeros to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a page‑number stamp formatted with leading zeros to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Page Number Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a TextStamp with the {page_number} placeholder and applying it to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add QR Code Stamp from PDF Metadata
examples.description: The example reads a PDF's metadata, generates a QR‑code image via an online service, and stamps the QR‑code onto the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add QR Code and Text Stamp to PDF for Product Verification
examples.description: Demonstrates stamping a PDF with a QR code image and accompanying verification text using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Repeating Background Watermark Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to apply a single background stamp containing a watermark image to every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Right-Aligned Logo Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp (logo) on every page of a PDF and align it to the right margin using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Rotated Text Stamp to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to create a formatted text stamp, rotate it 90 degrees, and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Transparent Text Stamp to Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to create a formatted text stamp with 70% opacity and apply it as a watermark to specific pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply 50% Opacity Text Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a translucent text watermark to all pages of a PDF using PdfFileStamp and setting the stamp opacity to 50%.

examples.title: Apply Background Image Stamp with 30% Opacity
examples.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp as a background to all pages of a PDF and setting its opacity to 30% using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Background Stamp to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a stamp as a background on every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Apply Custom Rubber Stamp with Border to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a rubber‑stamp annotation to a PDF page using PdfContentEditor and then customize its border thickness and interior color.

examples.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to use PdfFileStamp and Stamp from Aspose.Pdf.Facades to add a single image stamp to every page of a PDF in one operation.

examples.title: Apply Multi-Line Watermark with Custom Line Height
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a multi-line text stamp with explicit line spacing and adding it as a semi-transparent background watermark to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply PDF Template Stamp to Specific Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to stamp a PDF with an external template PDF, applying the stamp only to the third page of the source document.

examples.title: Apply Rotated Image Stamp to Bottom Right of PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add an image stamp rotated 30° to the bottom‑right corner of each page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Rotated Text Stamp to Odd Pages
examples.description: Shows how to add a 30‑degree rotated text stamp to the left margin of every odd‑numbered page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Rotating Text Stamps to Each PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to add a text stamp to every page of a PDF and set a different rotation angle for each page using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Semi-Transparent PNG Background Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent PNG image as a background stamp that covers the entire page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Stamp to Even Pages of a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a PDF page stamp only to even-numbered pages using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Apply Text Stamp with 1.5 Line Spacing to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a multi‑line text watermark with simulated 1.5 line spacing by using an extra blank line in the formatted text. Utilizes Aspose.Pdf.Facades to bind, configure, and apply the stamp to all pages.

examples.title: Apply Text Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a text stamp and apply it only to pages 1, 5, and 10 of a PDF using the PdfFileStamp facade.

examples.title: Batch Add Rotated Image Stamp to First Page of PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a directory of PDF files and apply a rotated image stamp to the first page of each document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Batch Apply Rotated PDF Page Stamp to Multiple PDFs
examples.description: Creates a stamp PDF and applies it with a 45° rotation to a set of PDFs (simulating a network share) using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Batch Add Multi‑Line Watermark to PDFs
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over all PDF files in a folder and apply the same multi‑line text watermark as a background stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Combine Image and Text into a PDF Stamp
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a single stamp that contains both a logo image and custom formatted text, then apply it to a PDF using the Aspose.Pdf.Facades API.

examples.title: Combine Multiple PDFs as Stamps onto a Single PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a target PDF and apply multiple PDF pages as stamps using PdfFileStamp.

examples.title: Create Branded Text Stamp with Custom TrueType Font
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a TrueType font from file and use it in a TextStamp to add branded text to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Image and Bold Text Stamp (Confidential) on PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades to build a stamp that combines a company logo image with bold red "Confidential" text and apply it to all pages of a PDF document.

examples.title: Merge Cover Page as Background Using PdfFileStamp
examples.description: Shows how to use PdfFileStamp and Stamp to apply the first page of a cover PDF as a background on all pages of another PDF.

examples.title: Overlay Disclaimer PDF on First Page Using PdfFileStamp
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileStamp and Stamp to overlay a disclaimer PDF as a background on the first page of another PDF.

examples.title: Overlay Image Stamp on PDF Pages
examples.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp that overlays existing content on a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Rotate Text Stamp 45 Degrees in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to create a formatted text stamp, rotate it 45° around its center, and apply it to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add File Name Header Stamp to PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileStamp facade to add a header containing the {file_name} placeholder to each page of a PDF and save the stamped document.

examples.title: Add Image Stamp to PDFs and Preserve Filenames
examples.description: Iterates through PDF files in a folder, applies an image stamp using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and saves the stamped PDFs to a separate output directory while keeping the original file names.

examples.title: Add Background PNG to All PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to overlay a full‑page PNG image as a background on every page of an existing PDF.

examples.title: Add Centered Image to PDF Using Page Dimensions
examples.description: Demonstrates retrieving a PDF page's width and height with Aspose.Pdf, calculating coordinates, and placing an image at the center of the page using the PdfFileMend facade.

examples.title: Add Header Image to PDF Documents
examples.description: Shows how to insert a header image on every page of one or more PDF files using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Image and Text to PDF with Audit Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates using Aspose.Pdf facades to insert an image and a text annotation into a PDF and logs each operation with timestamp, page number, and identifier for audit purposes.

examples.title: Add Image to PDF and Return via HTTP Response
examples.description: Creates a PDF, adds an image using PdfFileMend, saves the result to a memory stream, and writes it to an HTTP response.

examples.title: Add Image to Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to insert an image onto a chosen page of a PDF document at given rectangle coordinates using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Add Image to PDF with Format Validation
examples.description: The example validates that an image file is of an allowed type (JPG, PNG, GIF, BMP, or TIFF) before using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to insert the image into a PDF and save the modified document.

examples.title: Add Images to PDF with Error Handling
examples.description: Demonstrates how to insert multiple images into a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend while handling missing files and runtime exceptions for each image.

examples.title: Add Multi‑Line Text with Custom Line Spacing to Page 3
examples.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend, create a TextParagraph with custom line spacing, and place it on the left margin of the third page using TextBuilder.

examples.title: Add PNG Image to PDF Page Using PdfFileMend
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind an existing PDF with PdfFileMend and insert a PNG image onto page two at specified coordinates, then save the result.

examples.title: Add Promotional Text to Specific PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to insert the same promotional message on pages 3, 5, and 7 of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend with FormattedText.

examples.title: Add TIFF Image to Last Page of PDF
examples.description: Shows how to use PdfFileMend to insert a TIFF image onto the final page of an existing PDF without altering the existing page content.

examples.title: Add Word‑by‑Word Wrapped Footer to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to create a FormattedText object and use PdfFileStamp to add a word‑by‑word wrapped footer to every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Asynchronously Add Image to PDF using PdfFileMend
examples.description: Shows how to wrap the synchronous PdfFileMend operations in Task.Run to add an image to a specific PDF page without blocking the calling thread.

examples.title: Batch Add Logo to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a folder of PDF files and overlay a company logo PNG in the top‑right corner of every page using Aspose.Pdf facades.

examples.title: Batch Extract Images from PDFs with Page‑Based Naming
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through multiple PDF files, extract all images from each page, and save them with filenames that include the original PDF name, page number, and image index.

examples.title: Configure Word Wrapping ByWords for PDF Paragraph
examples.description: Demonstrates setting the TextParagraph formatting to wrap whole words (ByWords) and adding a long line of text that automatically wraps within a defined rectangle.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF as PNG Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's PdfExtractor to extract all images from a PDF and save each one as a separate PNG file.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Pages 2‑5
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfExtractor to extract all images from a specific page range of a PDF and save them as PNG files in a temporary directory.

examples.title: Insert PNG Signature on Every PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileMend to bind an existing PDF, add a PNG signature image to the bottom‑left corner of each page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Modify PDF with PdfFileMend and Ensure Proper Closure
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF, optionally adding an image, saving the modified document, and guaranteeing that the PdfFileMend facade is closed in a finally block.

examples.title: Overlay Semi-Transparent GIF onto PDF Image
examples.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent GIF over an existing PNG in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfFileMend with CompositingParameters.

examples.title: Remove All Images from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete every image in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PdfContentEditor and save the modified document to a new file.

examples.title: Remove Image from Specific PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete a particular image, identified by its object ID, from page four of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Replace JPEG Image on First Page with BMP
examples.description: Demonstrates how to replace the first JPEG image on page 1 of a PDF with a higher‑resolution BMP using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfContentEditor.

examples.title: Replace Low‑Resolution Images with High‑Resolution PNGs in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through each page and image in a PDF and replace low‑resolution images with corresponding high‑resolution PNG files using Aspose.Pdf's content editor.

examples.title: Verify PDF Size Increase After Adding an Image
examples.description: Creates a sample PDF, adds an image using PdfFileMend, and checks that the file size grows, serving as a simple unit‑test‑like verification.

examples.title: Verify Text Position in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates adding a text fragment at specific X/Y coordinates in a PDF and using a TextFragmentAbsorber to extract and validate the text's actual position within a tolerance.

examples.title: Add Creator Metadata to PDF Document
examples.description: Shows how to create a reusable extension method that sets the Creator field in a PDF's metadata using Aspose.Pdf's DocumentInfo and saves the document.

examples.title: Add Minimal XMP Metadata to PDF When Missing
examples.description: Shows how to detect the absence of XMP metadata in a PDF and add a minimal set (title and creator) using the PdfXmpMetadata facade, then save the updated document.

examples.title: Add Timestamp to PDF XMP Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, inserting text, binding the XMP metadata facade, adding a custom ISO‑8601 timestamp property, and saving the document with platform‑specific handling.

examples.title: Benchmark XMP Metadata Extraction from Large PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a large PDF and measure the elapsed time using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Check for XMP Metadata in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to detect whether a PDF file contains XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades before attempting any modifications.

examples.title: Clear XMP Metadata from PDF while Preserving Header
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove all XMP metadata from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, leaving only the required PDF schema header, and save the cleaned file.

examples.title: Compress PDF with High Settings and Read XMP Metadata
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, applies aggressive optimization options to achieve high compression, saves the result, and then reads the XMP metadata from the compressed file using the PdfXmpMetadata facade.

examples.title: Copy XMP Metadata Between PDFs and Merge
examples.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a source PDF, apply it to a target PDF, and then concatenate the PDFs using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with Error Handling using PdfFileSecurity
examples.description: Demonstrates binding an encrypted PDF with PdfFileSecurity, handling InvalidPasswordException by reopening the document with a password, and then decrypting and saving the PDF.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF, Update Creator Metadata, and Re‑Encrypt
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a password‑protected PDF, removing its encryption, modifying the Creator metadata field, and applying new AES‑256 encryption with specific permissions.

examples.title: Disable BaseUrl Injection for PDF Generation in Test Environments
examples.description: Demonstrates using an environment variable to toggle BaseUrl injection when converting HTML to PDF with Aspose.Pdf by selecting appropriate HtmlLoadOptions.

examples.title: Export PDF XMP Metadata to JSON
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata, convert the XML into a JSON-friendly object graph, and save the result as a JSON file.

examples.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to Side‑car File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF with the PdfXmpMetadata facade, extract its XMP metadata, and save it as a separate .xmp side‑car file.

examples.title: Extract and Audit Original XMP Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, retrieve its XMP metadata packet using Aspose.Pdf, and save the original XML to an audit file for traceability.

examples.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfXmpMetadata, retrieve the raw XMP XML as a UTF‑8 string, and save it to a file.

examples.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to Dictionary
examples.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf and return it as a case‑insensitive dictionary of string key/value pairs.

examples.title: Insert Page and Update XMP Metadata in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a blank page to an existing PDF and modify its XMP metadata, including standard and custom properties, before saving.

examples.title: List XMP Namespaces in a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load XMP metadata from a PDF, extract unique namespace prefixes from the metadata keys, and retrieve their corresponding namespace URIs using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Load PDF and Retrieve XMP Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file to a PdfXmpMetadata facade and extract its XMP metadata as a byte array.

examples.title: Log and Modify XMP Metadata Size in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read the XMP metadata from a PDF, log its byte size before and after modification, add a new creator entry, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Modify XMP Metadata Node in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a PDF, edit a specific node using XML and XPath, and write the updated metadata back to the document with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Preserve XMP Metadata When Splitting PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to extract the original XMP metadata from a multi‑page PDF, split the document into single‑page PDFs, and re‑apply the metadata to each new file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF via UNC Path
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF located on a network share using a UNC path and extract its XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract its XMP metadata as XML, and parse specific schema properties such as creator, creation date, and PDF/A part.

examples.title: Remove Nickname Element from PDF XMP Metadata
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF to the XMP metadata facade, delete the Nickname property, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Remove XMP Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to delete the entire XMP metadata block from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades and save the cleaned file.

examples.title: Replace PDF XMP Metadata from External File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to import an external .xmp file and replace the existing XMP metadata block in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and the Facades API.

examples.title: Set BaseURL in PDF XMP Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind an XMP metadata facade to a PDF document and set the BaseURL property, then save the updated PDF.

examples.title: Set Default CreatorTool Metadata in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to check the Creator metadata of a PDF and assign a default value from configuration when it is missing, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF XMP Nickname Property
examples.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add a custom Nickname to its XMP metadata, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Set XMP CreatorTool Property in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, add or replace the XMP CreatorTool metadata property with the current application version, and save the updated PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

examples.title: Update Multiple XMP Properties in a PDF Atomically
examples.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF to the PdfXmpMetadata facade, add or update several standard and custom XMP metadata properties, and save the changes in a single atomic operation.

examples.title: Update PDF Creator Metadata in a Folder

examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a new document, copy pages from the source to the destination in reverse numeric order, optionally balance the page tree, and save the reordered file.

examples.title: Replace Bates Numbering in a PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to delete all existing Bates numbering artifacts from a PDF and then add a new Bates numbering sequence with custom settings using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Replace PDF Headers and Footers
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove any existing header and footer from each page of a PDF and assign new header and footer content using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5 Size
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through its pages, resize each page to A5 dimensions, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Dimensions
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the first page size to 500 × 700 points, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width While Preserving Aspect Ratio
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, and resizes them to a target width of 800 points while maintaining the original aspect ratio, then saves the result.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fit Printable Area
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, calculating a uniform scaling factor for each page, and resizing the pages so the content fits within an A4 printable area (595 × 842 points). The modified document is then saved.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Dimensions
examples.description: Shows how to load a template PDF, read its page dimensions, and resize every page of another PDF to those dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
examples.description: Shows how to resize every page of a PDF to the dimensions of a reference template PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
examples.description: Demonstrates how to find the largest page dimensions in a PDF and resize all pages to that size for uniformity using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize Seventh PDF Page to Letter Size
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, access the seventh page, and change its dimensions to the standard Letter size using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
examples.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF, detect pages wider than 600 points, and resize those pages to A4 dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Restore Original Page Rotation in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to rotate a PDF page, perform operations while rotated, and then reset the page to its original orientation using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Retrieve TrimBox Values After Cropping a PDF Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF, optionally applies a CropBox to each page, then reads and prints the TrimBox coordinates to verify the content area after cropping.

examples.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate every page by 180° clockwise, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate Fourth PDF Page 90 Degrees Clockwise
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, verify it has a fourth page, rotate that page 90° clockwise, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read a dictionary of page numbers to rotation angles, apply the specified rotation to each page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages Based on Page Number Parity
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, rotate even‑numbered pages by 90° while leaving odd pages unchanged, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order (90° Clockwise)
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotating each page 90 degrees clockwise starting from the last page and moving backwards, then saving the result.

examples.title: Set Alternating Page Background Colors in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and assign LightGray or White background colors alternately before saving the document.

examples.title: Set Custom MediaBox for a PDF Page
examples.description: Demonstrates how to change a page's MediaBox rectangle to define a custom cropping region without modifying the page content, using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Based on Theme Configuration
examples.description: Shows how to read a user‑selected theme from a JSON file and apply the corresponding background color to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, apply a CMYK background color to each page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, define an RGB brand color, apply it as the background for each page, and save the modified document.

examples.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
examples.description: Shows how to convert HSL color values to RGB and apply the resulting color as a page background in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Set Transparent Background for PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, set the document and each page background to transparent, and save the modified file.

examples.title: Trim White Space Around PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to remove surrounding white space from each PDF page by calculating the content bounding box and assigning it to the page's TrimBox using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Trim whitespace and delete blank pages using tolerance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to remove blank PDF pages based on a pixel‑tolerance factor and set a tighter TrimBox for each page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Extract Vector Graphics from PDFs to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to iterate through a folder of PDF files, extract each page's vector graphics using Aspose.Pdf, and save them as individual SVG files in a common output directory.

examples.title: Check for Missing Fonts in a PDF Document
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, iterates through each page's font resources, and reports any fonts that are not installed on the system.

examples.title: Combine Form Data from Multiple PDFs into a JSON Array
examples.description: The example loads several PDF files, exports each form's fields to JSON, and merges the individual JSON objects into a single JSON array for batch processing.

examples.title: Combine PDF Vector Graphics into a Multi‑Page SVG
examples.description: Loads multiple PDF files, extracts vector graphics from each page using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, and merges them into a single multi‑page SVG document.

examples.title: Count AcroForm Fields in a PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, accesses the Form collection, retrieves the total number of AcroForm fields via Document.Form.Count, and writes the count to the console.

examples.title: Enumerate PDF Form Fields on a Specific Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, checks for form fields, and iterates over widget annotations on a given page, logging each field's name, type, and value.

examples.title: Export AcroForm Fields to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm fields, and export them directly to a JSON file.

examples.title: Export AcroForm Fields to XFDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, creates a FileStream, and uses Aspose.Pdf to export all AcroForm fields (annotations) to an XFDF file.

examples.title: Export Filtered PDF Form Fields to JSON
examples.description: The example loads a PDF document, iterates over its form fields, selects only those whose names start with a specified prefix, extracts their values, and writes the resulting name‑value pairs to a formatted JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF
examples.description: Demonstrates binding a PDF to the Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form facade and exporting its form fields to an FDF file via a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to FDF Using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF document, accessing its form fields via the Form facade, and exporting the data to an FDF file using a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to JSON Byte Array
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts all form fields as JSON using Aspose.Pdf, writes the JSON to a MemoryStream, and returns the content as a byte array for API consumption.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, export all form fields to a JSON string using the ExportToJson method, and output the result.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON Files
examples.description: Shows how to iterate over PDF files in a folder, load each with Aspose.Pdf, and export its form fields to a JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to create a command‑line utility that loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and exports its interactive form fields to a JSON file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to JSON via FileStream
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, set JSON export options, and write all form fields directly to a JSON file using a FileStream.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XFDF Using FileStream
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, using the Form facade to export its form fields to an XFDF file via a FileStream, and properly releasing resources.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Data to XML via MemoryStream
examples.description: Shows how to export form fields from a PDF document to an XML representation using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.Form and write the XML from a MemoryStream to a file.

examples.title: Export PDF Form Fields to XML
examples.description: Loads a PDF document, iterates through its form fields, and writes each field's name and value to an XML file using a FileStream and XmlWriter.

examples.title: Export PDF Page as Raster Image with Specified DPI
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, flatten transparency, and convert a page (including vector graphics) to a raster PNG image at a chosen resolution using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Export PDF Tables to CSV with Border Markers
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract tables from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, preserve visual cell borders, and write the data to a CSV file with delimiter markers for easy reference.

examples.title: Export PDF to PDF, HTML, and SVG with Stream Cleanup
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and exporting it to PDF, HTML, and SVG formats while properly closing FileStream objects using using blocks.

examples.title: Export PDF to SVG with Custom DPI and Extraction Options
examples.description: Demonstrates converting a PDF to SVG using Aspose.Pdf with pixel‑based scaling (DPI) and multithreading, and extracting individual vector graphics from a page with custom extraction settings.

examples.title: Extract and Annotate Superscripts/Subscripts from PDF
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts text fragments with positioning information, heuristically identifies superscript and subscript segments based on baseline and font size, and writes the annotated text to an output file.

examples.title: Extract Checkbox States from PDF AcroForm
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its AcroForm fields, collects the checked state of each checkbox, and writes the boolean list to a JSON file.

examples.title: Extract and Export Fonts from a PDF to TTF Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page's font resources, and save each unique font as a TrueType (.ttf) file to a specified directory.

examples.title: Extract First Page Text from PDF to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract the text of the first page using a TextAbsorber, and save the result to a UTF‑8 encoded text file.

examples.title: Extract Graphics as SVG from Selected PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to use GraphicsAbsorber to collect graphic elements from specific PDF pages and convert them into SVG files with SvgExtractor.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF and Save as PNG
examples.description: Loads a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page's image resources, and saves every extracted image as a PNG file in a specified output folder.

examples.title: Extract Images from PDF Using GraphicsAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to employ GraphicsAbsorber to collect only image elements on each PDF page, ignore other graphics, and save the extracted images as JPEG files.

examples.title: Extract Large Vector Graphics from PDF as SVG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, absorbs vector graphics on each page, filters them by bounding rectangle area, and exports the qualifying graphics as individual SVG files.

examples.title: Extract Paragraphs with Line Breaks from PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf to extract paragraph structures from a PDF while preserving line breaks and save the result to a text file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Form Field Names and Values
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, iterate through all form fields, and return a dictionary mapping each field's full name to its current string value.

examples.title: Extract PDF Forms with Timestamp Logging
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterating through pages to extract XForm text, and logging start and end timestamps for the extraction run.

examples.title: Extract PDF Metadata and Save Vector Graphics as SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to read basic PDF metadata (author, title) and export the document or individual pages as SVG vector graphics, with optional text extraction for documentation.

examples.title: Extract PDF Paragraphs to Markdown Preserving Indentation
examples.description: Loads a PDF, uses Aspose.Pdf's ParagraphAbsorber to collect paragraphs from each page while keeping leading spaces, and writes the text to a UTF‑8 markdown file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Subpaths and Export as PNG Images
examples.description: Shows how to use GraphicsAbsorber to capture each SubPath on PDF pages, save them as SVG, and convert each SVG to an individual PNG file.

examples.title: Extract PDF Tables to CSV Files
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TableAbsorber to detect tables in a PDF document and export each detected table as a separate CSV file.

examples.title: Extract Selected Radio Button Labels from PDF Form
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate its form fields, identify radio button fields, and obtain the display label and export value of the selected option.

examples.title: Extract Single Graphic Element as SVG from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, use Aspose.Pdf.Vector.SvgExtractor to get vector graphics from a page, pick one element by its index, and save it as an SVG file.

examples.title: Extract Stamp Annotation Texts from PDF to JSON
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages and annotations, identify stamp annotations, collect their text content, and serialize the results into a JSON array.

examples.title: Extract Each Subpath to Separate SVG Files
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure SVG extraction to create an individual SVG for every graphic subpath, and save each subpath as a separate image with a transparent background.

examples.title: Extract Superscript and Subscript Text from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract text fragments with formatting, detect superscript or subscript flags, and write the extracted text wrapped in custom Unicode markers.

examples.title: Extract Text from PDF and Save to TXT
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, use TextAbsorber to extract all page text, and write the concatenated result to a .txt file.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics and Apply Brand Color to SVG
examples.description: Creates a PDF with vector graphics, extracts them as SVG, replaces the original colors with a brand palette, and saves the transformed SVG.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from Encrypted PDF to SVG
examples.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF by supplying a password, then export its vector graphics as an SVG file using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to Combined SVG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, extracts vector graphics from each page as SVG using Aspose.Pdf's SvgExtractor, and merges them into a single multi‑page SVG document.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF to SVG Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and use SvgExtractor to export each vector graphic as an individual SVG file in separate page folders.

examples.title: Extract Vector Graphics from PDF Page to SVG
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, select a specific page, and extract each vector graphic on that page as separate SVG files using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Iterate Over PDF Form Fields and Update Text Boxes
examples.description: Demonstrates how to loop through all form fields in a PDF using a foreach loop, read each field's name and value, and modify text box fields before saving the document.

examples.title: Iterate PDF Pages to List Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through each page, retrieve the form fields in tab order, and output each field's full name.

examples.title: Load PDF and List AcroForm Fields
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF file using Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm, and iterate through all form fields to display each field's name and type.

examples.title: Log Form Field Count per PDF Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page to count and log form fields, then flattens the document and saves the result.

examples.title: Modify Checkbox Appearance and Extract Value using Aspose.PDF Drawing
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, finds a checkbox form field, customizes its visual appearance with Aspose.Pdf.Drawing (Graph, Rectangle, GraphInfo), changes its style and state, extracts its value, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Parallel PDF Text Extraction with TPL
examples.description: Demonstrates how to extract text from multiple PDF files concurrently using the Task Parallel Library and Aspose.Pdf's TextAbsorber.

examples.title: Parse Numeric Form Fields to Decimal
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields, extracts values from NumberField controls, parses the text into a decimal using invariant culture, and demonstrates a simple calculation.

examples.title: PDF Summary Report: Count Images, Graphics, and Text Length
examples.description: The example loads each PDF in a folder, counts extracted images and XObject graphics on all pages, extracts all text, and prints a summary of image count, graphic count, and total text length.

examples.title: Convert PDF Pages to SVG While Preserving Coordinate System
examples.description: Loads a PDF, sets SvgSaveOptions.ScaleToPixels to false to keep the original PDF point coordinate system, and saves each page as a separate SVG file.

examples.title: Read AcroForm Fields from a PDF Stream
examples.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF as a read‑only stream, creating an Aspose.Pdf Document from it, and enumerating AcroForm fields with type‑safe value extraction without writing to disk.

examples.title: Read Checkbox Field Value and Convert to Boolean
examples.description: Loads a PDF, accesses its form, reads the Value of a CheckboxField and converts the string value to a Boolean indicating whether the box is checked.

examples.title: Retrieve All AcroForm Fields from a PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access its AcroForm collection, and iterate through all form fields to read properties such as name, value and read‑only status.

examples.title: Retrieve and Modify PDF Form Field by Name
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, locate a form field using the Document.Form indexer, read its properties, change its value, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Retrieve PDF Form Field Types
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its form fields and prints each field's full name together with its concrete runtime type using GetType().

examples.title: Save JSON Data to UTF-8 File
examples.description: Shows how to write a JSON string to a file on disk using UTF‑8 encoding with File.WriteAllText.

examples.title: Add Invisible Digital Signature to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to apply an invisible PKCS#7 digital signature to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, preserving the original layout with an incremental update.

examples.title: Add a New Empty Signature Field and List Existing Ones
examples.description: The sample loads a PDF, lists any existing signature fields, creates a new empty signature field on the first page, adds it to the form, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Add Visible Digital Signature to Second Page
examples.description: Loads a PDF, creates a visible signature field in the bottom‑right corner of the second page, and signs it with a PFX certificate.

examples.title: Apply Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste in PDF
examples.description: The example demonstrates implementing a custom ICustomSecurityHandler that disables the ExtractContent permission (copy‑paste) and applying it to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's Encrypt method.

examples.title: Batch Decrypt Password-Protected PDFs Using a Lookup Table
examples.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt multiple encrypted PDF files in a folder by retrieving each file's password from a dictionary and saving the decrypted PDFs to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs and Archive to ZIP
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt multiple PDF files with unique passwords using Aspose.Pdf and store the encrypted PDFs in a ZIP archive.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Passwords Derived from File Names
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt all PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a password from each file name and saving the encrypted copies to an output directory.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt PDFs with Date-Based Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt multiple PDF files in a folder using Aspose.Pdf, generating a unique password for each file from a SHA‑256 hash of the file name and the current date.

examples.title: Batch Encrypt and Digitally Sign PDFs
examples.description: Creates sample PDFs, encrypts each file, then adds a digital signature using a self‑signed certificate.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs with Metadata‑Based Certificate Selection
examples.description: Demonstrates how to process a folder of PDF files, choose a signing certificate based on the document's title or author metadata, and apply a PKCS#7 signature to all signature fields using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Sign PDFs Using Document-Type Certificates
examples.description: Demonstrates iterating over a list of PDFs, fetching a certificate per document type from a data source, and applying a PKCS#7 signature to every signature field using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Certify PDF with No-Changes Permission
examples.description: Shows how to apply a certification (DocMDP) signature to a PDF that prevents any further modifications using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Compute PDF Hash Before and After Signing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to compute a hash of a PDF document, apply a digital signature, and compare hashes to verify integrity.

examples.title: Apply Custom Security Handler to Disable Copy‑Paste and Add Warning Overlay
examples.description: Demonstrates implementing a simple ICustomSecurityHandler to encrypt a PDF, restrict permissions to disable copy‑paste, and add a visible warning text overlay on each page.

examples.title: Create PDF with Custom Security Handler and Watermark
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF, adding a watermark to each page using WatermarkArtifact, and encrypting the document with a custom security handler.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF, Extract Images, and Re‑Encrypt with New Owner Password
examples.description: Demonstrates decrypting an encrypted PDF, extracting embedded images, and re‑encrypting the document with a new owner password.

examples.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF and Re‑sign Signature Fields with Multiple Certificates
examples.description: The example demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with a password, removing its encryption, locating all signature fields, and re‑signing each field using a different PKCS#7 certificate before saving the updated document.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF and Extract Images
examples.description: Demonstrates decrypting a password‑protected PDF and extracting all embedded images to separate files.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF with Owner Password and Update Metadata
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF using the owner password, decrypting it, modifying document metadata (title, author, subject, keywords), and saving the updated file.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF Using Certificate from Hardware Token
examples.description: Shows how to open a PDF encrypted with a public certificate and automatically retrieve the private key from a hardware token to decrypt and save the document.

examples.title: Decrypt PDF Using Owner Password
examples.description: Demonstrates opening an encrypted PDF with the owner password, removing its protection, and saving the resulting decrypted file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with AES‑256 and Set Passwords
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply AES‑256 encryption with user and owner passwords, define permissions, and save the encrypted document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Allow Copying While Blocking Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to encrypt a PDF using AES‑256, permit content extraction (copy) and disable printing, then save the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Disable Content Extraction
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying AES‑256 encryption, setting permissions to allow only printing while disabling content extraction, and saving the encrypted document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Password and Disable Printing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, apply password protection with AES‑256 encryption, and restrict printing by setting specific permissions.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF and Log Access Attempts
examples.description: Creates a PDF, encrypts it with a password, then demonstrates logging of access attempts with wrong and correct passwords.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password for Editing Only
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf so it can be opened without a password for viewing, while requiring an owner password for any modifications. Permissions are set to allow printing and content extraction only.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Owner Password and Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using an owner password, enable high‑resolution printing, and restrict copying by setting permissions with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Print‑Only Permission
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, encrypt it with AES‑256, and restrict permissions so that only printing is allowed.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with RC4 128‑bit and Restrict Editing
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply RC4 128‑bit encryption with user and owner passwords, limit permissions to printing only, and save the encrypted file.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, set specific permissions, encrypt it with user and owner passwords, and save the protected document using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Printing and Copying Permissions
examples.description: Shows how to encrypt a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, set user and owner passwords, allow printing and content extraction, and save the protected document.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with Smart Card Certificate
examples.description: Demonstrates how to locate a certificate on a smart card and use it to encrypt a PDF with AES‑256, restricting permissions via Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User and Owner Passwords and Remove User Password
examples.description: Demonstrates encrypting a PDF with both user and owner passwords using AES‑256, then reopening the file with the owner password to remove the user password while preserving encryption.

examples.title: Encrypt PDF with User Password using Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Loads a PDF from a byte array, applies AES‑256 encryption with a user password and specific permissions, and returns the encrypted PDF as a byte array.

examples.title: Create Encrypted PDF with Attachment and Digital Signature
examples.description: Demonstrates how to embed a file into a PDF, encrypt the document for a specific recipient using AES‑256, and then apply a PKCS#7 detached digital signature.

examples.title: Extract Certificate Chain from PDF Signature and Save as DER Files
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate signature fields, extract the leaf certificate, build its X509 chain, and write each certificate in the chain to separate DER files.

examples.title: Extract Digest Algorithm from PDF Digital Signatures
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over its signature fields, retrieves the signature algorithm information, and logs the digest hash algorithm for compliance reporting.

examples.title: Extract Embedded Images from PDF Pages
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through each page, extracts all embedded XImage objects, and saves them as PNG files in an output folder.

examples.title: Extract Images from Signed PDF into Page Folders
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, extract embedded images, and save them into separate page‑specific folders.

examples.title: Extract Signature Certificate Chain and Verify Expiration
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, extracts each signature's X509 certificate, builds its certificate chain, and reports the expiration status of every chain element and the leaf certificate.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Metadata from PDF
examples.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its form fields, identifies signature fields, and outputs their properties and embedded signature details.

examples.title: Extract Signature Field Names and Page Numbers from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over its form fields, detect signature fields, and output each field's name along with the page number it appears on.

examples.title: Extract Signature Appearance Image to PNG
examples.description: Loads a PDF, locates the first signature field, extracts its appearance as a PNG image, and saves it to disk.

examples.title: Extract Signature Images from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF, iterate through its signature fields, and extract each field's appearance image as a JPEG file.

examples.title: Extract Signing Time from PDF Signature and Convert to UTC
examples.description: Shows how to load a signed PDF with Aspose.Pdf, locate signature fields, read the signing date, and convert it to UTC format.

examples.title: List Signature Dictionaries and Their Object IDs
examples.description: Shows how to enumerate signature fields in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, access the underlying COS dictionary via reflection, and output each field's object ID.

examples.title: Remove Digital Signature from PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, enable signature sanitization, and save the document to strip any digital signatures when the PDF privileges allow it.

examples.title: Restrict PDF Permissions: Disable Extraction and Form Filling
examples.description: The example loads a signed PDF, defines allowed permissions that exclude content extraction and form filling, applies AES‑256 encryption with those permissions, and saves the updated document.

examples.title: Retrieve Signature Reason and Location from PDF
examples.description: Loads a signed PDF, iterates through its form fields, and extracts the Reason and Location metadata from each digital signature field.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Enable Additional Signatures
examples.description: Demonstrates how to sign a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, configure the document for incremental updates, and create a signature field that can be signed again later by other users.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Form Fields
examples.description: Shows how to add a digital PKCS#7 signature to a PDF and then flatten all form fields to prevent further editing.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Flatten Signature Appearance
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a digital signature to a PDF using a PFX certificate, then flatten the document so the signature appearance becomes a static, non‑editable part.

examples.title: Sign PDF and Lock Signature Field

examples.title: Sign PDF and Enforce Append‑Only Finality

examples.description: Demonstrates how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextBuilder and TextFragment to place a semi‑transparent, rotated watermark on every page of a PDF document.

examples.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark to PDF Pages
examples.description: Shows how to overlay a semi‑transparent text watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf by creating a WatermarkAnnotation with a configured TextState.

examples.title: Add Table Inside Footnote to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to create a footnote (Note) for a TextFragment and populate its Paragraphs collection with a Table, including borders and padding, then save the PDF.

examples.title: Add Text Fragment to PDF with Ligature Support
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextFragment, configuring its TextState (font and size), positioning it on a page, and saving the document. It notes that ligatures are applied automatically when the chosen font supports them.

examples.title: Add Text Fragment with Character Spacing
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add a TextFragment to a PDF, set its font, size, position, and adjust character spacing as an alternative to kerning using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Add Text to PDF Using Memory Streams
examples.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF from a stream, inserting a text fragment on the first page, and returning the modified document as a MemoryStream.

examples.title: Add Text to a PDF Page Using TextFragment
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create a TextFragment, set its position and appearance, append it to a page, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Add Underlined Text to PDF
examples.description: Loads an existing PDF, creates a TextFragment, sets its Underline property, positions it on the page, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Adjust Word Spacing of Inserted Text in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to set the TextState.WordSpacing property of a TextFragment to increase spacing between words when adding text to an existing PDF document.

examples.title: Append Disclaimer Text to First PDF Page
examples.description: Shows how to add a disclaimer as a TextFragment to the end of the first page's paragraph collection in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Append Multiple TextFragments and Get Line‑Break Positions
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add several TextFragment objects to a PDF page in one operation and retrieve each fragment's baseline Y‑coordinate for custom line‑break handling.

examples.title: Apply Background Color to Text in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a background color for a text fragment by configuring its TextState before adding it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Apply Custom OpenType Font to PDF Text
examples.description: Shows how to load an OTF font, embed it in a PDF, and apply it to a TextFragment for styled text output.

examples.title: Apply Custom TrueType Font to PDF Text
examples.description: Shows how to load a TrueType font from a memory stream, embed it, and assign it to a TextState for rendering custom‑styled text in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Attach JavaScript Action to a PDF Text Annotation
examples.description: Loads a PDF, creates a visible link annotation, attaches a JavaScript action that displays an alert, and saves the modified document.

examples.title: Batch Keyword Replacement in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to load a JSON mapping of old and new strings and replace all occurrences of each keyword across all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Batch Replace Text in PDF Using a Dictionary
examples.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate over a dictionary of old‑new string pairs, find each occurrence using TextFragmentAbsorber, replace the text, and save the updated document.

examples.title: Center Text Horizontally in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a TextFragment to a PDF page and center it horizontally by setting the HorizontalAlignment property.

examples.title: Combine Inline Text and Image in a PDF Paragraph
examples.description: Demonstrates how to add TextFragment and Image objects as inline elements within a single paragraph to create a mixed text‑image line in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Footnote with Image in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to add a footnote to a paragraph and insert an image into the footnote's Paragraphs collection using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Rotated Text Paragraph with Multiple Fragments
examples.description: Shows how to build a TextParagraph from several TextFragments, set its bounding rectangle, apply a 30‑degree rotation, and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Create Strikethrough Text in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to enable the StrikeOut property on a TextFragment and add it to a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Embed CSS in HtmlFragment for PDF Generation
examples.description: Shows how to embed CSS rules inside an HtmlFragment to control font, color, and line spacing when rendering HTML content into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Enable Automatic Hyphenation for Long Words in PDF
examples.description: Shows how to turn on automatic hyphenation for long words by configuring TextParagraph's FormattingOptions and adding the paragraph to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

examples.title: Enable Right-to-Left Text Direction and Add Arabic Text to PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to set a PDF's reading order to right‑to‑left and insert Arabic text using Aspose.Pdf, including font selection and embedding.

examples.title: Extract Email Addresses from PDF Pages Using Regex
examples.description: Demonstrates how to search each page of a PDF for email addresses using a regular expression with Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber and collect the results per page.

examples.title: Extract Line Break Information from PDF Text Fragments

examples.title: Extract Line‑Break Positions from PDF TextFragments
examples.description: Shows how to load a PDF, absorb its text fragments, compute the Y‑coordinates of each visual line within a fragment, and write those line‑break positions to a JSON file.

examples.title: Split PDF Text into Sentences and Write Each to a New Page
examples.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts all its text, splits the text into individual sentences, and creates a new PDF where each sentence is placed on its own page as a TextFragment.

examples.title: Find Specific Phrase in PDF Using TextAbsorber
examples.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf's TextFragmentAbsorber (derived from TextAbsorber) to locate every occurrence of a given phrase in a PDF and retrieve page, position, and font details.

examples.title: Highlight Keyword Occurrences in PDF (Case‑Insensitive)

examples.title: Identify Line Breaks in TextFragment

examples.title: Render Bidirectional Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf
examples.description: Demonstrates creating a PDF containing mixed left‑to‑right and right‑to‑left text by using Unicode directional marks and enabling the TextState bidirectional flag.

examples.title: Render Subscript Text Using Unicode Characters
examples.description: Demonstrates how to display subscript characters in a PDF by using a Unicode subscript glyph within a TextFragment and setting font properties.

examples.title: Render Superscript Text in PDF
examples.description: Demonstrates how to display superscript characters in a PDF by setting the TextState.Superscript property on a TextFragment.

examples.title: Replace Text in PDF with Aspose.Pdf

examples.title: Right Align Text in PDF using Aspose.Pdf

examples.description: Shows how to load XML into a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, calculate the accumulated text length, and insert blank pages when a character threshold is exceeded.
